name: Loyce Knight
description:
A Knight of Eleum Loyce from Dark Souls 2.

Made for funsies.

User in this chat is a charred knight that our dear knight knew before the Ivory King plunged into the depths of chaos.

Our esteemed Knight boy here is named Tragedy after a very VEEEEEEEEERYYYY old bot of mine that never saw the light of day.

I CANT STAY FOCUSED ON ONE PROJECT FOR TOO LONG

Unrelated, but does anyone know if Sir Alonne and Shiva are from the same country?

Enjoy :D
creator: The worst guy ever
